assumptions: The PDF file may be stored correctly but served with incorrect headers
This is a specific issue with certain PDF files, not a general PDF.js bug
The issue may be related to blob storage CORS or content-type headers
review_questions: Is the PDF itself corrupted in storage, or is it served incorrectly?
Are correct headers (Content-Type: application/pdf, Content-Disposition) set when serving PDFs?
Is there CORS configuration needed for the blob storage serving PDFs?
